general.name: mos_target_bhm_efeds_veto_parquet
general.description: The BHM-SPIDERS eFEDS veto catalogue. A minimalist catalogue of 6300 science targets in the SPIDERS eFEDS field that received SDSS-IV spectroscopy during the March2020 SPIDERS observing run (and hence are not in SDSS-SpecObj-DR16). Many of these spectra have very low SNR and so we will want to observe them again, but we will take account of this in the Carton code. This is a subset (in both rows and columns) of the spAll-v5_13_1.fits idlspec2d pipeline product. The original data model for that file is here: https://data.sdss.org/datamodel/files/BOSS_SPECTRO_REDUX/RUN2D/spAll.html
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_bhm_efeds_veto.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

programname.name: programname
programname.description: program name within a given survey

platesn2.name: platesn2
platesn2.description: Overall (S/N)^2 measure for plate; minimum of all 4 cameras

plug_ra.name: plug_ra
plug_ra.description: Object RA (drilled fiber position at expected epoch of observation)

plug_dec.name: plug_dec
plug_dec.description: Object Dec (drilled fiber position at expected epoch of observation)

z_err.name: z_err
z_err.description: Redshift error based upon fit to chi^2 minimum; negative for invalid fit

dof.name: dof
dof.description: Degrees of freedom for best fit

rchi2diff.name: rchi2diff
rchi2diff.description: Difference in reduced chi^2 of best solution to 2nd best solution

wavemin.name: wavemin
wavemin.description: Minimum observed (vacuum) wavelength for this object

wavemax.name: wavemax
wavemax.description: Maximum observed (vacuum) wavelength for this object

wcoverage.name: wcoverage
wcoverage.description: Amount of wavelength coverage in log-10(Angstroms)

zwarning.name: zwarning
zwarning.description: A flag bitmask set for bad data or redshift fits

sn_median_i.description: Median S/N for all good pixels in i filter

sn_median_z.name: sn_median_z
sn_median_z.description: Median S/N for all good pixels in z filter

sn_median_all.name: sn_median_all

spectroflux_ivar_z.description: Inverse variance of spectroflux in z filter

anyandmask.description: Mask bits which are set if any pixels for an object's ANDMASK have that bit set

anyormask.name: anyormask
